data.body: Obsoleted by ADR 0047 (Accepted): 'retire the auto-lander; land via Gerrit Rebase-If-Necessary + agent Submit'. The auto-lander is being deleted wholesale (infra/autolander/, land/land-status commands) by decommission story bcf0 (in_progress). Fixing an auto-lander behavioral defect is wasted effort against an accepted retirement — closing as obsolete rather than fixing. Not a live GitHub Actions failure.
